title: neobertiera micrantha
intro: Neobertiera micrantha, a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neobertiera micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Neobertiera micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
